title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 272.330 - Application of law
text:
272.330.  Application of law. — 1.  The provisions of sections 272.240 to 272.350 shall apply to any division fence even though it may stand wholly upon one side of the division line.
  2.  The provisions of sections 272.210 to 272.370 shall not apply to counties which have all or partial open range.
(L. 1963 p. 401 § 13)
